headline: VICI Properties (VICI) Expands Hospitality Portfolio with Club Med Resort Investment
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) ranks among the best sin stocks to buy for recession protection. On June 15, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) secured the Carambola Beach Resort in St. Croix, U.S. Virgin Islands, for refurbishment into a Club Med resort, marking the company’s comeback into US territory. VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) will fund the total […]

headline: How I'd Retire On $1.2 Million Without Chasing Yield
summary: The classic 4% Rule is outdated for most markets; a 3.5% or even lower rate may be safer, especially during periods of elevated valuations or poor returns. Read the full analysis here.
